steps.title: Expand the right side
steps.content: Distribute 2 on the right side of $w - 10 = 2(w + 5)$: $$w - 10 = 2w + 10$$

steps.title: Isolate w
steps.content: Subtract $w$ from both sides: $$-10 = w + 10$$ Then subtract 10 from both sides: $$-20 = w$$ That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
